message:
fix: deep audit fixes for security, reliability, and correctness

Security:
- Add timing-safe token comparison in appeals and support ticket APIs
- Fix DMCA email validation regex to reject double-dots

Reliability:
- Add reversal idempotency guard in moderation action-store
- Use DST-safe deadline calculation in appeal-store
- Cap share-link view tracking to prevent memory growth
- Wrap homepage client components in ErrorBoundary
- Fix downloadBlob cleanup timing in BasketSidebar

Correctness:
- Fix review pagination offset after submitReview
- Remove duplicate fetchedRef pattern in useAllRatings and useLeaderboard
- Use crypto.randomUUID() for roadmap IDs instead of counter
- Clamp relevance bar values in CLI suggest command

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
